title: 有馬記念の後に・さまよう

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though Seiun Sky gets the big win, Grass Wonder
still earns an impressive place at the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Yeah! You ran like a champ today, Grass Wonder!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
You really are the Beast's Successor! I'm sure
Maruzensky's watching you like a hawk!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
choice_data_list: That was a great race, Grass.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for the kind words... Still, I can't help
but feel like it wasn't enough.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: This race should have been more...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hmm... I see how it is.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: You left yourself wide open today, Grass.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Were you even trying out there?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Well, I guess we all have our off days.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...Just don't go doing this to me again.
